description_long: This house features a modern, rectilinear design with clean lines and a flat roof, divided into two main volumes connected by a central section. The exterior is predominantly white with accents of gray and black, and includes multiple large windows arranged in both horizontal and vertical patterns. There are several outdoor terraces and overhangs, as well as a pool or water feature adjacent to one side. The structure appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back from the lower, creating shaded outdoor spaces. Entryways are defined by steps and covered porches, and the overall layout suggests a spacious, open-plan interior. The house is constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, large windows, and multiple terraces. The design features clean lines, outdoor living spaces, and a pool or water feature.
description_view_0: This view highlights the long, linear profile of the house, showing the stepped arrangement of the two main volumes and the central connecting section.
description_view_1: From this angle, the flat roof and the pool or water feature are prominent, along with the covered terrace and entry steps.
description_view_2: This view emphasizes the symmetrical arrangement of windows and doors on the rear facade, as well as the spacious terrace areas.
description_view_3: Here, the front entryway with steps and a covered porch is visible, along with the staggered arrangement of the house's two main sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large horizontal and vertical windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features steps, a covered porch, and a minimalist door with no ornate decoration.
